# BLACKTERM Original Icon System

This directory contains the original BLACKTERM OS application icon family.

- Designed specifically for BLACKTERM OS
- Consistent 96×96 SVG viewBox
- Shared glass, depth, edge-lighting, and electric-blue visual language
- Individually illustrated silhouettes for every application
- No third-party icon library or downloaded artwork

The pack includes Identity, Projects, Explorer, Security Center, Skills Monitor, Certifications, Career, Resume, GitHub Live, TryHackMe, Assistant, Gallery, Terminal, Secure Comms, Settings, Interview Mode, and the BLACKTERM emblem.
